title: GUI Yamada Ryo
description: Makes a GUI in the style of the character Yamada Ryo from the anime Bocchi the Rock!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3b3d3d0d593f37d7623dfd650496759967ba714.png)
# ABOUT
This texture pack changes the GUI to match the character Yamada Ryo from the anime Bocchi the Rock! It features a pleasant blue color scheme, perfectly matching the character, who will now appear in almost every interface in the game. The HUD is also updated to match the texture pack's style, and Yamada Ryo will immediately greet you in the game's main menu. **Screenshots of the texture pack in-game are below.** I hope you enjoy this texture pack. _Enjoy the game!_
# IMPORTANT
- ### **Is there a port on the Bedrock Edition?**
  This texture pack is designed exclusively for Java Edition. We do not plan to release a version for Bedrock Edition.
- ### **Want to use it on Bedrock Edition?** 
  You can port the texture pack yourself, as long as you comply with all license terms.
- ### **Pack version warning ?**
   There is a high chance that resource packs will work with different versions of Minecraft without the need to change the version of the pack, unless there is a major update that breaks resource packs.
